summary: Tested Flowstar Asset Recovery backend (9 pytest cases) and frontend e2e via Playwright. Backend: 9/9 endpoints passing (health, blog list+single+404, leads CRUD+invalid email+resend-not-configured, list sorted desc, contact). Frontend: Home page renders Hero, stats ribbon, process section, eligibility checker, testimonials, About, FAQ, contact, footer. Eligibility checker Step 1 (state+property_type) gating works; Continue properly disabled/enabled. Contact form submitted successfully end-to-end to /api/contact and showed success. Blog index lists 4 cards, navigation to /resources/what-are-surplus-funds works and article loads. FAQ accordion expands. Header CTA present; mobile menu toggle present and clickable. No backend or critical frontend bugs.
critical_code_review_comments: RESEND_API_KEY empty path correctly logs-and-skips inside send_lead_notification; fire-and-forget via asyncio.create_task ensures lead creation latency is unaffected — good.
list_leads correctly excludes Mongo _id via projection {_id:0} — good.
Consider adding rate limiting / basic spam protection on POST /api/leads and POST /api/contact (no auth on lead endpoints; abuse risk).
GET /api/leads is unauthenticated and exposes all submitted PII (email, phone) publicly — recommend adding admin auth or removing from public router before production.
Pydantic Lead model inherits LeadCreate so contact-created Lead documents store source='contact_form' but lack property_type/state/etc (fine, all Optional).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_ prefixed leads via backend tests (TEST Jane Doe, TEST NoResend, TEST Contact User) and 1 contact-form lead via UI (TEST Contact PW). Stored in mongo db 'test_database', collection 'leads'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_flowstar_api.py — 9 tests, all green against external URL. Playwright note: eligibility checker Step 2/3 use shadcn radio-group buttons (not native inputs); to fully automate, click the visible button containing the option text (e.g., 'Mortgage Foreclosure', 'Under $10,000') AND use .evaluate to set date value if input[type=date].fill doesn't trigger React onChange. Step 1 → Step 2 transition works (verified). Contact form fully verified e2e. POST /api/leads with full eligibility payload verified via pytest (test_create_lead_full).
rca of the issue: No production bugs found. The only automation friction was advancing the eligibility checker past Step 2 because the date input + custom radio components didn't accept Playwright fill/click events cleanly. Underlying form logic (canNext gating) and submit endpoint are confirmed working via direct API tests and code review of ClaimChecker.jsx.
